scholar.en: Tan Liangxiao et al., wheel-carrier reading

summary.zh: 依据《事物纪原》的独轮车解释，以中央大轮承重、双辕供人平衡和转向。
summary.en: Reads the Shiwu Jiyuan as a central-wheel carrier whose twin shafts let the operator balance and steer.

provenance.note: The central-wheel arrangement is the wheelbarrow reconstruction, not a dimensioned ancient drawing.

@rest.note: Wheel radius, width, and spoke count are reconstruction parameters.

notes.zh: 原文没有中央轮尺寸；本方案仅把《事物纪原》的独推车解释和“仰双辕”落实为可交互模型。
notes.en: The sources give no central-wheel dimensions; this patch turns the one-person wheelbarrow reading into an interactive model. The year is the 1996 publication date of Tan Liangxiao's collected study, not an ancient construction date.
